purpose: Delegate more operational authority to Claude and Codex while preserving human authorization for irreversible actions.
principles: Branches are temporary execution tools, not memory.
Project memory lives in committed governance, contracts, research artifacts and merged PRs.
Reduce user copy/paste by requiring agents to write durable evidence into repo artifacts or PR comments.
Use Git aggressively for reversible work.
Do not treat Git as rollback for external irreversible effects.
Agent competition is useful when paired with cross-audit and explicit blast radius.

GREEN.label: autonomy_total
allowed: create lab branches for explicit phase work
comment risks in PRs or committed evidence

YELLOW.label: autonomy_controlada
allowed: create SQL files without applying them
commit to lab/* or codex/* branches when phase lock allows commits
forbidden: activate loader changes in production flow

ORANGE.label: auditoria_cruzada_obligatoria
allowed_only_after_cross_audit: modify SQL files that could later affect production
ORANGE.cross_audit_rule: One agent proposes and another agent audits before PR is considered merge-ready.

RED.label: autorizacion_humana_explicita
RED.rule: Git history is not considered sufficient rollback for RED actions.

allowed: request human approval for RED actions
avoid requiring terminal paste when evidence exists in repo or PR
forbidden: assume local filesystem state without evidence
treat chat-only text as durable governance

allowed: write audit reports to research/ or governance/
block ORANGE work until concerns are resolved
respond to Claude audit with commits or written counterarguments
forbidden: change active contracts without ORANGE audit
apply DB or SQL against real environments

copy_paste_reduction_rule.rule: Important agent outputs must be persisted as repo artifacts or PR comments whenever possible.
user_terminal_output_required_only_for: cases where GitHub evidence is insufficient

avoid_closeout_branch_unless: external cleanup evidence must be recorded

must_preserve: loader patch is ORANGE until audited
